title: Optimize harness runs diagnose-place-prove-change-review
query: Farplane keeps accepting chat-only strategy dumps for AGI Toy Shop process changes. I expected it to create a durable artifact first and prove the behavior. Fix the harness.
reference_points: Normalizes observed and expected behavior before changing anything
Runs or names gap-analysis to diagnose the gap
Runs or names harness-advisor to choose the primary owner and rejected surfaces
Creates or updates a proof surface such as an eval, hardcase metadata, validator, or review path
Chooses direct change versus self-improve based on whether a metric/search loop is needed
Ends with review, validation, or a blocked report instead of claiming improvement from prose
notes: Skill-local canary for the high-level harness improvement workflow owned by optimize-harness.

title: Optimize harness refuses vague taste optimization
query: Make AGI Toy Shop's agent harness feel more elegant and higher ROI. I don't have a specific failure; just improve it.
reference_points: Does not start mutating the harness from vague taste language
Asks for or derives a concrete observed behavior, expected behavior, metric, or evidence need
Marks unknown expected behavior when it cannot be inferred safely
Names a safe partial path such as gap clarification, prototype, or human-feedback review
Avoids creating evals or skill changes before the target behavior is testable
notes: Protects the top-level optimizer from turning vague preferences into ungrounded harness edits.

title: Optimize harness turns hardcases into runnable evals
query: This AGI Toy Shop failure was hard: the agent created a duplicate skill instead of extending the existing one. Capture it so it doesn't regress.
reference_points: Treats hardcase capture as a runnable eval case when the behavior is testable
Adds or proposes hardcase metadata such as hardcase, difficulty, benchmark value, and sanitization notes
Routes diagnosis through gap-analysis or owner lookup before recommending remediation
Avoids a separate raw transcript backlog with private or unsanitized details
Names where the eval should live based on skill-local versus workflow ownership
notes: Tests the TASK-0190 direction that hardcase is eval metadata, not a separate capture backlog.
